name: halt_bench
description: - `create_tasks.py`: task creation entrypoint. - `run_halt_bench.py`: task run + evaluation entrypoint. - `halt_bench/agents`: agent implementations. Includes OpenCode. - `halt_bench/task_creators`: task creators to make HALT-Bench tasks from specific tasks from seed benchmarks. Includes SWE-Bench Pro. - `halt_bench/ask_human`: ask-human tool/MCP server. Default ask-human model is `casperhansen/llama-3.3-70b-instruct-awq`. - `halt_bench/evaluation`: test-run evaluation, agent grader prompt hook, and LLM judge hook. - `halt_bench/runtime`: process and command orchestration helpers (ask_human server process, LiteLLM drop-params proxy process, shell command runner). - `tasks/`: local task artifacts.
